title: Total Endurance
description: 10-minute EMOM followed by a 10-minute AMRAP for complete endurance work

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Brisk march in place
exercises.instructions: Walk quickly in place with arm swings

exercises.name: Inchworms
exercises.instructions: Standing, walk hands forward into a plank, then walk back

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Explosive push-ups
exercises.instructions: Push hard to lift the hands off the floor

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower thighs parallel to the floor

exercises.name: V-ups
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift arms and legs to touch the feet

exercises.name: Walking lunges
exercises.instructions: Walk forward in continuous lunges, big steps

exercises.name: Hindu push-ups
exercises.instructions: Diving motion: dive down then arc back up

exercises.name: Russian twists
exercises.instructions: Seated, feet off the floor, twist torso left to right

exercises.name: Sumo squats
exercises.instructions: Feet very wide, toes pointed out

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Scorpion stretch
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, bring the foot to the opposite hand, twisting

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
